name: Kielbasa with Peppers, Onions, & Mashed Potat
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Smoked kielbsas (Polish sausage), cut into 1" pieces
1 Yellow bell pepper, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1 Red bell pepper, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1/2 cup Water plus 2 tbsp hot water
1 tbsp Unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy skillet, heat the oil over moderate heat until it is hot but not smoking.
2. Add the kielbasa and brown in the oil for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
3. Add the bell peppers and onion and cook the mixture, stirring, for 1 minute.
4. Add the water and simmer the mixture, covered partially, for 10 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
5. While the kielbasa mixture is simmering, steam the potatoes in a steamer set over boiling water for 12 minutes, or until very tender. Transfer to a bowl and mash with a potato masher.
6. Beat in the milk, hot water, scallion, butter, and salt and pepper to taste. Stir until the butter is melted.
7. Serve the kielbasa mixture on top of the mashed potatoes. Serves 2.
